overall.description: First-person game footage of a character walking across a snowy mountain slope under clear blue skies, passing ice formations and ascending toward a distant peak. The video shows continuous forward movement through a winter mountain environment with game UI elements visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field on mountain slope

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snow field toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peak visible in the distance against blue sky
gently sloping terrain covered in white snow with visible texture
distant ice formation on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: Walking across an open snow-covered mountain slope with a prominent peak visible in the distance. The terrain is flat to gently sloping with clear blue skies overhead and distant ice formations visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with ice wall formations

events.description: large ice wall with blue-tinted crevasses comes into view on the left side
passing alongside the ice wall, which begins to fall behind the camera

agents.ego_description: walking past a massive ice formation on the left while continuing the mountain ascent

entered.detail: tall vertical ice wall with layered snow and ice textures
deep crevasse showing blue-tinted ice within the snow wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent while passing a massive ice wall with blue-tinted crevasses on the left. The camera moves alongside the ice formation for a significant distance before the wall begins to recede behind, with the mountain peak now appearing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow slope ascending toward peak

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady climb up the snow slope with the mountain peak drawing nearer

entered.detail: snow and ice formations visible on the right side of the slope

segments.scene_description: Ascending the open snow slope with the mountain peak now prominently visible ahead. The ice wall has passed behind on the left, while new ice formations appear on the right side as the steady climb continues toward the summit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward ascent across a snowy mountain slope that transitions from an open expanse to a narrow passage between ice formations. It begins by traversing a flat, snow-covered terrain under clear blue skies with a distant peak serving as the primary focal point. As the camera moves forward, the open landscape shifts as a massive ice wall with blue-tinted crevasses emerges on the left, flanking the path for a significant distance. The scene then opens back up as the ice wall recedes behind the camera, bringing the mountain peak into prominent view. Finally, the steady climb continues toward the summit as new ice formations appear on the right, mirroring the structures previously passed.
